topic: A three-bedroom house keeps revealing a fourth bedroom in a different location each time.
title: There Is A Fourth Bedroom In My House | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: The listing said three bedrooms, but I keep finding a fourth in a different place each time.
scenes.image_prompt: a dim doorway opening onto an unfamiliar small bedroom with a single bed, low light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It is a tidy three bedroom house. I counted them at the showing.
scenes.image_prompt: a real estate floor plan on paper showing three bedrooms, dim desk lamp, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Three doors. Three rooms. I was certain.
scenes.image_prompt: a hallway with three closed bedroom doors in a row, dim light, soft shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then one night a fourth door stood at the end of the hall.
scenes.image_prompt: a dim hallway with a fourth door at the far end that should not exist, deep shadow, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Inside was a made bed and a window facing the wrong way.
scenes.image_prompt: a small bedroom with a neatly made bed and a window showing impossible darkness, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The next day that door was gone, just blank wall.
scenes.image_prompt: an empty hallway wall where a door had been, faint outline in the plaster, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Days later it reappeared behind my coat closet.
scenes.image_prompt: an open closet revealing a hidden bedroom doorway behind the hanging coats, dim light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Always the same room. Same bed. Same wrong window.
scenes.image_prompt: the same small bedroom with a made bed and a dark misplaced window, deep shadow, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each time the bed looked more slept in, the sheets warmer.
scenes.image_prompt: a small bed with rumpled warm sheets in a dim bedroom, an impression in the pillow, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night the fourth door opened from inside my own bedroom wall.
scenes.image_prompt: a bedroom wall splitting open into a dark doorway beside a sleeping area, deep shadow, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: A framed photo sat on its nightstand. It was my family, but one face was wrong.
scenes.image_prompt: a framed family photograph on a dim nightstand, one figure blurred and indistinct, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Tonight the wrong face is sleeping in the fourth bed, waiting for the room to move.
scenes.image_prompt: a made bed in a dim bedroom with a faint impression of a figure under the blanket, deep shadow, low light, vertical 9:16 framing
